chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1410 of 2023 [Ubedullah Rajper vs. PO Sindh & others] Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5980/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 08-10-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. This Petition was filed in the year, 2023 and was lastly fixed in Court on 05-10-2023, when Counsel for the Petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court as to the maintainability of this Petition. Thereafter, no one has turned up to pursue the matter or to address the question of maintainability. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
